holdings.infoBox: DGRS is an equity ETF with a total of 199 individual holdings. The top holdings are Archrock stock at 2.55%, Avnet at 2.51%, Victory Capital Holdings at 2.06%, California Resources at 1.90%, and Cohen & Steers at 1.74%.

overview.description: The WisdomTree US Smallcap Quality Dividend Growth Fund (DGRS) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in small-cap stocks. The fund tracks a dividend-weighted index of US small-cap stocks with growth characteristics. DGRS was launched on Jul 25, 2013 and is issued by WisdomTree.
infoTable: WisdomTree U.S. SmallCap Quality Dividend Growth Index
